name: Web Travel Group Limited
analysis: WEB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.0100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.0650, stop A$2.2968, target A$3.6600 (0.77:1) — then trail it.
